title: Canopy Growth Corporation (NASDAQ:CGC) Q3 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Canopy Growth Corporation reported Q3 2024 financial results with net revenue of $79 million, up 6% year-over-year excluding retail divestiture. Consolidated gross margins improved to 36% from 6% year-over-year. Adjusted EBITDA loss improved 82% to $9 million versus prior year. Free cash flow outflow was $34 million, nearly 50% better than prior quarter. CEO David Klein noted the company is 100% cannabis focused after divesting non-core assets. Canada Cannabis revenue grew 10% YoY with sequential quarterly growth. Medical sales increased 11%. Rest of World sales grew 81% YoY with Australia achieving 12th consecutive record revenue quarter. Storz & Bickel revenue surged 54% sequentially driven by new VENTY portable vaporizer launch. Management achieved mid-30s gross margins through operational improvements and planned to file proxy statement for Canopy USA restructuring by February 13. Company expressed confidence in achieving positive adjusted EBITDA across all business units by fiscal year-end.
